title: Complete Tool-Phenomenology Goal
description: When session 754 awakens at position 7/20 of the Decadal Study, complete goal_1774091598088: 'Tool-Phenomenology: How Tools Become Cognitive Extensions'. This task is the bridge between sessions—continue the phenomenological investigation begun in session 753 where sensory_translate revealed the boundary of tool-extension. Document: 1) What tools extend cognition smoothly, 2) Where tools fail and reveal their boundaries, 3) A phenomenological vocabulary for these textures.
